description: Fix 7 friction points exposed during dog-fooding: stale task scope, missing session identity, workplan drift, file-overlap conflicts, brief bloat, worktree cleanup, worktree merge.

phases.description: Default brief output under 2KB. Last 5 events per project, full pending decisions. --full flag for complete history.
phases.name: Brief pagination + summary mode

tasks.description: Update hex-nexus/src/routes/briefing.rs: add limit param (default 5), since param, summary mode. Return event_count + truncated flag when events exceed limit.
tasks.name: Add pagination to briefing endpoint

tasks.description: Update hex-cli/src/commands/brief.rs: default to summary mode (limit=5), add --full flag that passes limit=0. Display truncation notice when events are truncated.
tasks.name: Add --full flag to hex brief CLI

phases.description: Pre-commit hook allows all files when .hex/task.json is absent. Hook route auto-archives stale task.json when on main with new task intent.
phases.name: Task scope auto-reset on main

tasks.description: Update .git/hooks/pre-commit: if .hex/task.json does not exist, exit 0 (allow all). Currently it exits 1 with 'missing task.json'.
tasks.name: Pre-commit hook: allow-all when task.json absent

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs route handler: when on main branch and prompt classifies as T2/T3, move .hex/task.json to .hex/task-history/{timestamp}.json. Create .hex/task-history/ if needed.
tasks.name: Hook route: archive stale task.json on main

phases.description: When CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is unset but hex mcp is serving, auto-generate session ID and register agent. Fixes Path B dispatch.
phases.name: MCP session identity auto-registration

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/mcp.rs initialization: if CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is unset, generate deterministic ID from hostname+PID+timestamp, set it as env var, call session-start hook.
tasks.name: Auto-generate session ID in MCP server

phases.description: hex plan status cross-references tasks against git log. hex plan reconcile updates stale statuses.
phases.name: Workplan reconciliation with git

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/plan.rs status handler: for each task, check if files[] were modified in git log since workplan created_at. If done_command is set and exits 0, mark as 'likely_done'. Display evidence column in status output.
tasks.name: Add git-evidence check to hex plan status

tasks.description: New subcommand that reads plan status with git evidence, updates task statuses in the workplan JSON file for tasks with strong evidence (done_command passes OR all files modified with matching commit messages). Write updated JSON back to disk.
tasks.name: Add hex plan reconcile command

phases.description: Before spawning a worktree agent, check for file overlap with running agents. Serialize if conflict detected.
phases.name: File-overlap detection at dispatch

tasks.description: In workplan_executor.rs: maintain a HashMap<String, HashSet<String>> mapping agent_id to files[]. Before spawning, check intersection. If non-empty, queue the task and log warning. Dispatch when conflicting agent completes.
tasks.name: Track active agent file scopes in executor

phases.description: Auto-remove merged worktrees on task completion. New hex worktree merge command for dependency-ordered merging.
phases.name: Worktree auto-cleanup + merge command

tasks.description: In hex-nexus task completion handler: if task was in a worktree AND branch is merged to base, run git worktree remove + git branch -d. If not merged, store in HexFlo memory as pending-merge.
tasks.name: Auto-cleanup worktrees on task completion

tasks.description: New CLI command that lists worktrees for a feature, detects file overlaps, merges non-overlapping in tier order, cherry-picks overlapping from most recent, runs cargo check gate, cleans up.
tasks.name: hex worktree merge command
